zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Elizabeth Reade於1545年出生時，她的父親Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter22歲，母親Isabella20歲。她於大約1563年與Richard Carpenter在英國維爾爾結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1636年1月25日享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Elizabeth Reade was born in 1545, her father, Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter, was 22 and her mother, Isabella, was 20. She married Richard Carpenter about 1563, in Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 January 1636, at the age of 91, and was buried in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Elizabeth Reade est née en 1545, son père, Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabella, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Carpenter environ 1563, à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 janvier 1636, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Elizabeth Reade è nata il nel 1545, sua padre, Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Isabella, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Richard Carpenter circa 1563, nel Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1636, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Elizabeth Readeが1545年に生まれた時，父Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenterは22歳，母Isabellaは20歳であった。約1563年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアでRichard Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1636年1月25日に91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Elizabeth Reade(이)가 1545년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1563년 영국 윌츠히르에서 Richard Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1636년 1월 25일 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Elizabeth Reade nasceu em 1545, seu pai, Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabella, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Carpenter aproximadamente 1563, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Elizabeth Reade родилась в 1545 г., её отцу по имени Robert Whealon Reade-Carpenter было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Carpenter около 1563 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 января 1636 г. в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
